calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jun-13-2005 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jun-13-2005 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the Department of the Presiding Judge for Prov-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Maria Viscio.
Elizabeth McDonald, Esq. for Plaintiff: Midland Credit Management, Inc.
Declaration of Erin Masterson in lieu of direct testimony, received and filed in court.
No appearance by the Defendant: Lydia Valenzuela.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendant as follows:
Principal of $1,417.46
Interest $184.83
Costs $295.40, for a total of $1,897.69
Judgment signed in open court.
